source.name: zcta_atlas — combined ZIP/ZCTA geo + ACS demographics + ADI + CDC PLACES health
source.access_method: GeoParquet: Zip_All spine (reprojected) + CDC ZCTA health (wide) + ADI ZCTA

columns.name: GEOID
columns.description: 2020 ZCTA5 code, 5-char string. Joins zctas_2020.GEOID20.

columns.name: ALAND20
columns.description: Land Area (Census): Land area in square meters (Census 2020) [sq meters]

columns.name: AWATER20
columns.description: Water Area (Census): Water area in square meters (Census 2020) [sq meters]

columns.name: county_fips
columns.description: County FIPS: Federal Information Processing Standard code for county

columns.name: state_fips
columns.description: State FIPS: Federal Information Processing Standard code for state

columns.name: county_name
columns.description: County Name: Name of county

columns.name: state_abbr
columns.description: State Abbreviation: Two-letter state abbreviation

columns.name: cbsa_code
columns.description: CBSA Code: Core Based Statistical Area code

columns.name: cbsa_name
columns.description: CBSA Name: Core Based Statistical Area name

columns.name: land_area_sqmi
columns.description: Land Area: Land area in square miles [sq miles]

columns.name: water_area_sqmi
columns.description: Water Area: Water area in square miles [sq miles]

columns.name: latitude
columns.description: Latitude: Geographic center latitude [degrees]

columns.name: longitude
columns.description: Longitude: Geographic center longitude [degrees]

columns.name: is_urban
columns.description: Is Urban: Whether the ZIP Code is urban (1) or not (0) [binary]

columns.name: is_rural
columns.description: Is Rural: Whether the ZIP Code is rural (1) or not (0) [binary]

columns.name: residential_ratio
columns.description: Residential Ratio: Ratio of residential address coverage [ratio]

columns.name: business_ratio
columns.description: Business Ratio: Ratio of business address coverage [ratio]

columns.name: other_ratio
columns.description: Other Ratio: Ratio of other address coverage [ratio]

columns.name: total_ratio
columns.description: Total Ratio: Ratio of total address coverage [ratio]

columns.name: per_white
columns.description: White: Percentage of population that is white [%]

columns.name: per_unemployed
columns.description: Unemployed: Percentage of labor force that is unemployed [%]

columns.name: per_poverty
columns.description: Poverty: Percentage of population living below poverty line [%]

columns.name: per_married
columns.description: Married: Percentage of population that is married [%]

columns.name: per_hispanic
columns.description: Hispanic: Percentage of population that is Hispanic or Latino [%]

columns.name: per_hh_withkids_under18
columns.description: Households with Kids: Percentage of households with children under 18 [%]

columns.name: per_foreign_born

columns.name: per_college_above

columns.name: per_black
columns.description: Black: Percentage of population that is black [%]

columns.name: per_asian
columns.description: Asian: Percentage of population that is Asian [%]

columns.name: per_65_over
columns.description: 65 and Over: Percentage of population aged 65 and over [%]

columns.name: median_income
columns.description: Median Income: Median household income [$]

columns.name: median_gross_rent
columns.description: Median Gross Rent: Median gross rent [$]

columns.name: median_age
columns.description: Median Age: Median age of residents [years]

columns.name: hh_size
columns.description: Household Size: Average household size [people]

columns.name: racial_diversity_index
columns.description: Racial Diversity Index: Gini-Simpson index for racial diversity [index]

columns.name: gini
columns.description: Income Inequality: Gini coefficient for income inequality [index]

columns.name: avg_commute_time
columns.description: Average Commute Time: Average commute time to work [minutes]

columns.name: population
columns.description: Population: Total population [people]

columns.name: population_density
columns.description: Population Density: Population per square mile [people/sq mi]

columns.name: median_home_value
columns.description: Median Home Value: Median value of owner-occupied housing units [$]

columns.name: adi_national_rank
columns.description: Neighborhood Atlas ADI national percentile, area-aggregated to ZCTA (v4.0.1, 2023). Replaces the source file's unsourced ADI.

columns.name: adi_state_decile
columns.description: Neighborhood Atlas ADI state decile, area-aggregated to ZCTA.

columns.name: health_n_measures
columns.description: Count of non-null health_* measures for this ZCTA after backfill (0-40).

columns.name: health_n_backfilled
columns.description: How many health_* measures were filled from the tract->ZCTA aggregate (0 = all native CDC ZCTA).

columns.name: health_source
columns.description: Health provenance: 'native' (all from CDC ZCTA), 'mixed' (some backfilled), 'aggregated' (all from tract), 'none' (no health). PA/KY are mostly 'mixed'/'aggregated' due to the CDC ZCTA gap.

columns.name: geometry
columns.description: ZCTA polygon boundary, WGS84 (EPSG:4326), reprojected from source NAD83.

limitations: Grain: one row per ZCTA from Zip_All (32,409). 32,306 resolve to the TIGER zctas_2020 geo file.
Coverage (non-null of 32,409): ACS demographics 32,409; ADI 32,193; PLACES health 32,304.
The source file's older *_zip health columns were DROPPED and replaced by the 2025 CDC PLACES ZCTA release (with confidence intervals; long file at data/staged/health/places_zcta_latest.parquet).

CDC's ZCTA file provides only ~5 of 40 measures for Pennsylvania and Kentucky ZCTAs (a CDC source-side restriction affecting ONLY those two states). Null health cells are backfilled with a population-weighted tract->ZCTA aggregate from the complete tract PLACES file. Per-row provenance is in health_source / health_n_backfilled. Backfilled values are aggregates (no native ZCTA confidence intervals).

Residual unfillable gaps (left NULL, not imputed): PA's 6 health-related-social-needs measures (FOODSTAMP, FOODINSECU, HOUSINSECU, LACKTRPT, EMOTIONSPT, SHUTUTILITY) are absent from CDC PLACES at every geography for PA, so there is no source to backfill; LONELINESS exists only in the 2025 ZCTA file (not the 2024 tract file), so it cannot be backfilled for any ZCTA missing it natively (affects PA & KY). After backfill PA averages 33/40 and KY 39/40 measures; no ZCTA is fully empty.

The source file's own `ADI` column (unknown provenance) was DROPPED and replaced by the canonical Neighborhood Atlas v4.0.1 ADI, area-aggregated to ZCTA (an approximation; see adi_atlas_zcta_2023 sidecar).
ACS demographic definitions are carried verbatim from the Zip_All source metadata; they were computed upstream (not by zcd derivations) — exact ACS table provenance is not in that metadata.
ZIP-code geography from the source approximates ZCTAs; it is NOT the tract spine dim_geo. Validate against zctas_2020, not dim_geo.
Geometry reprojected NAD83 (4269) -> WGS84 (4326). 146 ZIPs (~0.45%) have NULL geometry in the source (point/PO-box ZIPs without a ZCTA polygon); their attribute rows are retained.
license: Composite: ACS (public domain), CDC PLACES (public domain), Neighborhood Atlas (non-commercial).
citation: Composite ZCTA analytic table for The ZIP Code Destiny. Sources: ACS-derived ZIP demographics (Zip_All); CDC PLACES ZCTA 2025; Neighborhood Atlas ADI v4.0.1 (2023).
